Student Welfare Counsellor Committee Anti Ragging Committee SC/ST Cell Contact STUDY IN INDIA X TNEACODE 2739 Campus tour Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 INWARD MOBILITY INWARD MOBILITY With its state-of-the-art facilities and highly experienced professors, Sri Eshwar invites interested overseas students for Inward Mobility programs such as Semester @ Sri Eshwar, Internships and Summer/Winter School programs at its campus. The inward programs provide an opportunity for the incoming students to study/carry out research work on advanced technologies and experience the Indian culture and heritage. Overseas students interested in the above inward mobility programs may contact the CIR at internationalrelations@sece.ac.in. EXPERIENCE THE LAND OF CULTURAL DIVERSITY Coimbatore! A city in the brink of rapid modernization India is a highly diverse country, with a fusion of different cultures, languages, beliefs and lifestyles. It is a country that is advancing in technology and business space at a rapid pace, while being very possessive of our culture and values. We safeguard them no matter what. Coimbatore is located in Southern India, and is a city on the brink of rapid modernization. Coimbatore is a city full of heart, where the old vintage charm is still evident amidst the fast-paced advancements in infrastructure to make this city, truly, the best of both worlds.It is a city full of heart and soul – a city that gives respect to every individual big or small. An entrepreneurial city, known for its powerful manufacturing, garment and many other core companies. Due to its strategic location, excellent weather all year round and connectivity Coimbatore is fast emerging as the next IT hub of Tamil Nadu. Coimbatore has many scenic places, museums, lakes, sports activities that one can enjoy. With good weather round the year, and an entrepreneurial spirit in the air, Coimbatore sure will accelerate your passion to be an achiever! About Sri Eshwar – well, you need to be here to experience the magic. What are you waiting for? COME EXPERIENCE SRI ESHWAR! Inspiring Ambience Top Class Faculty Challenging Peers Fun Campus Why semester @ Sri Eshwar? Experience our research & innovation ecosystem at Sri Eshwar Opportunities to collaborate and work with high quality faculty and students Experience international learning and culture Enhance career prospects in India and abroad Create value add to your profile. APPLICATION PROCESS Who can apply? Students with Minimum CGPA of 8.0 or equivalent in their university. Should have been enrolled as a full time student when they apply. Undergrads with English as their first language will be exempted from IELTS. How to apply? Decide the semester of study. Indian Fall Semester (July - Dec). Indian Winter Semester (Jan - June). Submit the required forms/transcripts duly signed, within the application deadline. Application form can be downloaded from the CIR page/Downloads section of Sri Eshwar’s website Academic transcripts (translated into English if required) Deadline - 3 months before the start of the semester. Early submission is highly encouraged. Attend virtual interview within 1 to 2 weeks of submission of application Receive your admission intimation (if selected) through email within 4 weeks after application deadline Got admitted! What’s next? Visa & Immigration Once accepted, the CIR will provide guidance and necessary documentation for the student visa application process. Buy Health Insurance plan Incoming students must have valid health insurance coverage. The college will provide information on insurance options available. Accommodation Accommodation and food will be taken care of by Sri Eshwar for the incoming overseas students at Sri Eshwar’s hostel facilities. The hostel details will be confirmed to the students upon arrival. Attend Pre-Onboarding Orientation Incoming students are required to attend a pre orientation session covering academic expectations, campus life, and available resources before their arrival. Seek Program Related Counseling The CIR offers counseling services to help incoming students to get acclimatized to the ambience at Sri Eshwar campus These sessions can be sought anytime prior to and during the program. Sri Eshwar provides opportunities for incoming students to participate in cultural exchange programs, student clubs, and other events to foster cross-cultural understanding and engagement. Contact CIR office at any point, if you have questions in the application process. INTERNSHIPS @ SRI ESHWAR Sri Eshwar invites overseas students for project/research internships. Specific research internships is applicable for UG/Masters students and PhD scholars in order to collaborate with our research scholars/guides to carry out research activities over a period of 1 to 3 months. This gives an opportunity for the overseas students to spend considerable time at Sri Eshwar’s Advanced Research Centres. Through our Centres of Excellence, project internships in emerging technologies will also be provided for international students. APPLICATION PROCESS Who can apply? Students must be from a partner institution of Sri Eshwar. Students must be in the 2nd year or more of their current undergraduate program. Masters and Phd scholars are eligible to apply anytime during the course of their program How to apply? Submit the following documents through email to cir@sece.ac.in Statement of Purpose (One page) Updated CV or Resume (One page) Transcripts or records of the last academic period (non-official transcripts admitted) English proficiency tests (for select countries) Contact CIR office at any point, if you have questions in the application process. SRI ESHWAR SUMMER/WINTER SCHOOL PROGRAMS A visit to Sri Eshwar by students from overseas institutions would provide them with an opportunity to engage in a short-term course on an emerging technology, experience the Sri Eshwar campus infrastructure, and immerse themselves in Indian culture and heritage through conducted tours. The CIR facilitates 1 to 3-week immersion programs for students from overseas institutions during the summer/winter holidays. Sri Eshwar is happy to provide accommodation and food to the overseas students enrolling in these programs. Contact CIR office at any point, if you have questions in the application process. CIR - OFFICE Mr.Kannan Narasimhan Dean – Industry & International Relations +914259200320 Email: kannan_narasimhan@sece.ac.in Ms.Ramya Krishna Office Secretary, CIR +914259200320 Email: internationalrelations@sece.ac.in COME JOIN US TO EXPERIENCE LEARNING AT ITS BEST!
